# XQUBE Studio

> AAA game art and XR production studio. Vienna · Dubai · Dhaka.

XQUBE Studio GmbH delivers production-grade 3D game assets for PC, console, mobile, and VR. Specialists in environments, props, weapons, vehicles, VR assets, and platform-native experiences on UEFN and Roblox. 15+ years of AAA pipeline experience working with studios worldwide.

## Services

- [Environments](https://www.xqubestudio.com/services/environments): Modular level art, biomes, and interior sets built to engine spec — from a single interior to a full game world.
- [Props](https://www.xqubestudio.com/services/props): Hero interactive objects to full background dressing libraries, produced at scale without sacrificing quality.
- [Weapons](https://www.xqubestudio.com/services/weapons): Firearms, melee, sci-fi, and fantasy weapons built to AAA spec — full pipeline from high poly to in-engine integration.
- [Hard Surfaces](https://www.xqubestudio.com/services/hard-surfaces): Vehicles, aircraft, spacecraft, and heavy machinery with structural accuracy and full LOD chains.
- [VR Assets](https://www.xqubestudio.com/services/vr-assets): VR-native asset production optimised for Meta Quest, PSVR2, and PC VR from day one.
- [UEFN & Roblox](https://www.xqubestudio.com/services/uefn-roblox): End-to-end island and experience production — scripting, art, QA, and publish. Shipped a live Fortnite island with Fresh TV.

## Portfolio

- [Portfolio](https://www.xqubestudio.com/portfolio): AAA game art portfolio spanning environments, props, weapons, vehicles, and VR assets for PC, console, and mobile.

## Company

- [About](https://www.xqubestudio.com/about): Studio story, team bios, and hub locations — Vienna, Dubai, Dhaka.
- [Blog](https://www.xqubestudio.com/blog): Game art production insights, pipeline breakdowns, and studio news.
- [Contact](https://www.xqubestudio.com/contact): Book a discovery call or send a message — we respond within 24 hours.
- [Get a Quote](https://www.xqubestudio.com/scope): Submit your asset brief and receive a detailed quote within 24 hours.

## Discovery

- [Sitemap](https://www.xqubestudio.com/sitemap.xml): Full site URL list in XML format.
- [robots.txt](https://www.xqubestudio.com/robots.txt): Crawl rules including explicit per-agent AI bot rules.
- [API Catalog](https://www.xqubestudio.com/.well-known/api-catalog): Machine-readable site description per RFC 9727.
